description: lib.rs:48-70 ignores SecretUri::param entirely. URI 'secretx:file:/etc/key?atomic=false' is accepted as if it had no params — same problem as Doppler crate-secretsx-um3l.6. A user typoing a future config knob or assuming a flag exists gets silent acceptance. Fix: iterate parsed.params() (gated by avkc.4 — params are not yet iterable by key) and reject any unknown keys. Alternative: document explicitly that file backend takes no params and silently ignores them; this is the weaker option.
title: from_uri silently accepts unknown query parameters (typo footgun)
